languages.original_text: "As the flagship's Chief Enginseer, I veto any procedures of sacred augmentation involving substances of xenotic origin."

languages.text: "Как главный технопровидец флагмана, я накладываю вето на любые процедуры священной аугментации, в которых задействованы субстанции ксенотического происхождения".
"As the flagship's Chief Enginseer, I veto any procedures of sacred augmentation involving substances of xenotic origin."
languages.original_text: "Как главный технопровидец флагмана, я накладываю вето на любые процедуры священной аугментации, в которых задействованы субстанции ксенотического происхождения".

traits.locale_text: "As the flagship's Chief Enginseer, I veto any procedures of sacred augmentation involving substances of xenotic origin."
"As the flagship's Chief Enginseer, I veto any procedures of sacred augmentation involving substances of xenotic origin."
"As the flagship's Chief Enginseer, I veto any procedures of sacred augmentation involving substances of xenotic origin."

languages.text: «Como visioingeniero jefe de la nave insignia, prohíbo todo procedimiento de aumento sagrado que involucre sustancias de origen xenos».
languages.original_text: "As the flagship's Chief Enginseer, I veto any procedures of sacred augmentation involving substances of xenotic origin."

traits.locale_text: «Como visioingeniero jefe de la nave insignia, prohíbo todo procedimiento de aumento sagrado que involucre sustancias de origen xenos».

languages.text: 「旗艦の主席エンジンシアとして、自分は異種起源の物質を伴う神聖なる増強処置の一切を拒否します」
languages.original_text: "As the flagship's Chief Enginseer, I veto any procedures of sacred augmentation involving substances of xenotic origin."

traits.locale_text: 「旗艦の主席エンジンシアとして、自分は異種起源の物質を伴う神聖なる増強処置の一切を拒否します」

languages.text: “作为旗舰的首席引擎先知，我强烈反对任何异形源物质在神圣植入改造手术中的存在。”
languages.original_text: "As the flagship's Chief Enginseer, I veto any procedures of sacred augmentation involving substances of xenotic origin."

traits.locale_text: “作为旗舰的首席引擎先知，我强烈反对任何异形源物质在神圣植入改造手术中的存在。”

languages.text: "Als leitender Maschinenseher des Flaggschiffs spreche ich mich gegen jegliche heilige Augmentation aus, die Substanzen xenotischen Ursprungs umfasst."
languages.original_text: "As the flagship's Chief Enginseer, I veto any procedures of sacred augmentation involving substances of xenotic origin."

traits.locale_text: "Als leitender Maschinenseher des Flaggschiffs spreche ich mich gegen jegliche heilige Augmentation aus, die Substanzen xenotischen Ursprungs umfasst."

languages.text: « En tant que technaugure en chef du vaisseau amiral, je mets mon véto sur toute procédure d'augmentation sacrée qui impliquerait des substances d'origine xénos. »
languages.original_text: "As the flagship's Chief Enginseer, I veto any procedures of sacred augmentation involving substances of xenotic origin."

traits.locale_text: « En tant que technaugure en chef du vaisseau amiral, je mets mon véto sur toute procédure d'augmentation sacrée qui impliquerait des substances d'origine xénos. »

languages.text: "Sancak gemisinin Baş Mühedyumu olarak zeno kökenli maddeler içeren kutsal ogmentasyon prosedürlerini veto ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "As the flagship's Chief Enginseer, I veto any procedures of sacred augmentation involving substances of xenotic origin."

traits.locale_text: "Sancak gemisinin Baş Mühedyumu olarak zeno kökenli maddeler içeren kutsal ogmentasyon prosedürlerini veto ediyorum."
